Non-processed foods

72,724 unprocessed & minimally-processed foods (NOVA 1), scored 0–100 by how filling they are per calorie. Higher = more fullness for fewer calories. Search and filter the lot.

max kcal/100g 900 min score 0
Score distribution
Satiety per calorie = how full a food leaves you for the energy it costs. Scored from energy density, protein, fibre, fat and food form (uncapped 0–100 scale), validated against the Holt (1995) Satiety Index. Data: Open Food Facts (NOVA-1, ≥10 kcal/100g). For ranking, not medical advice.
